name: Single - Very high income (EUR 8,000/month x 14)
description: Very high income employee earning EUR 112,000 annually, standard region. Monthly salary exceeds SV cap. Tests 48% bracket.

sources.description: Verified against karriere.at Brutto-Netto-Rechner 2026 (EUR 8,000/month x 14 = EUR 112,000)
